info.name: Driver Leave & Availability Calendar - API Tests
info.description: Postman Collection containing endpoint verification tests for the Review 2 MVP API.

request.description: Verifies that the Express API server is active and running.
Retrieves the list of active drivers to populate the frontend selection dropdown.
Retrieves all logged leave requests sorted by creation date (newest first) for the dashboard.

body.raw:
{
    "Drivers": "Valluri Spoorthi",
    "planned": "2026-06-20T08:00:00.000Z",
    "leaves": "2026-06-25T17:00:00.000Z",
    "unavailability": "Medical Leave",
    "admin": "Assigned to backup driver for corporate run."
}

request.description: Submits a valid leave request matching the database schema and active drivers registry.

body.raw:
{
    "Drivers": "Valluri Spoorthi",
    "planned": "2026-06-26T10:00:00.000Z",
    "leaves": "2026-06-22T08:00:00.000Z",
    "unavailability": "Personal Leave",
    "admin": "Should trigger a date validation mismatch."
}

request.description: Tries to submit a request where the start date is after the end date. Express validation should reject with HTTP 400.

item.name: Log Invalid Leave Request (Driver Not Found)

body.raw:
{
    "Drivers": "Unknown Driver Name",
    "planned": "2026-06-20T08:00:00.000Z",
    "leaves": "2026-06-25T17:00:00.000Z",
    "unavailability": "Vacation",
    "admin": "Should fail due to foreign key/registration check."
}

request.description: Tries to submit a request for an unregistered driver. DB validation should reject with HTTP 400.
